_meta.description: News sources seed data — converted from production JS config to KAI DB schema (news_sources + source_selectors + source_categories). Selectors are as provided/validated; main content uses Readability with these as fallback.
notes: Indonesian sources: original_language='id'. Korean sources (Korea Times, Yonhap, Korea Herald, KCNA): original_language='en' with auto_translate=true.
Category value starting with http:// goes to url_override; otherwise url_suffix (empty string means feed = base_url).
ai_cleanup=true for sources with noisy HTML (Detik, CNN, Okezone, Tribun, detikFinance).
auto_publish=false by default (review as draft first). Schedules are staggered to avoid simultaneous scraping.
